caption: A woman with long dark hair is seen from the chest up, positioned in an indoor setting with a light-colored wall and a yellowish-green curtain behind her. She is wearing a purple and white striped button-down shirt and large black over-ear headphones with an attached microphone. The text "Nancy Ramya" appears in the bottom left corner of each scene. Throughout the sequence, the woman is speaking, with her facial expressions and mouth movements changing as she talks. In the first scene, she has a slight smile and looks forward. By the second scene, her mouth is open as she speaks. In the third scene, her eyes are closed and her mouth is partially open. In the final scene, her eyes are open again and she is smiling while speaking. The background remains static, showing a neutral wall and a glimpse of a horizontal surface to her right.
